fact_nuggets.text: Dark Aura (Japanese: Dark Aura) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature Ability of Yveltal.
Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD Dark-type moves of all Pokemon become more powerful!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura increases the power of Dark-type attacks by approximately 33% (or more accurately, by a factor of 5448/4096) for all Pokemon on the field. This effect is inverted by Aura Break , instead dividing the power of Dark-type attacks by 4/3, resulting in a 25% reduction in damage. The effects will not stack multiple times if more than one Pokemon has this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Dark Aura increases the power of Dark-type attacks by approximately 33% (or more accurately, by a factor of 5448/4096) for all Pokemon on the field. This effect is inverted by Aura Break , instead dividing the power of Dark-type attacks by 4/3, resulting in a 25% reduction in damage. The effects will not stack multiple times if more than one Pokemon has this Ability.
Strengthens dark moves to 1.33 their power for all friendly and opposing Pokemon.
Boosts all Dark-type attacks on the field
